markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore a content collaboration between GrowthX and Webflow.](https://fathom.video/share/CsFKcaS3_vV13w71Em4eL-AWPz7E2nos?tab=summary&timestamp=690.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Collaboration Proposed:** GrowthX will contribute to a new Webflow University course on AI-Enhanced Optimization (AEO), sharing its expertise in scaling high-quality content.](https://fathom.video/share/CsFKcaS3_vV13w71Em4eL-AWPz7E2nos?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Expertise:** GrowthX builds "content machines" that use AI and human experts to scale content creation. For Webflow, this system increased integration docs from \~3/week to 30–40/week, now read by 30k–50k users weekly.](https://fathom.video/share/CsFKcaS3_vV13w71Em4eL-AWPz7E2nos?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [**Webflow's Challenge:** The Webflow University team struggles to keep pace with rapid feature releases, facing bottlenecks in scriptwriting and post-production for its high-quality, human-centric video brand.](https://fathom.video/share/CsFKcaS3_vV13w71Em4eL-AWPz7E2nos?tab=summary&timestamp=402.0)
  - [**Next Steps:** Curtis will propose an interview with Jason for the AEO course. Jason will send sample clips, and Curtis will provide a course scope to guide the content.](https://fathom.video/share/CsFKcaS3_vV13w71Em4eL-AWPz7E2nos?tab=summary&timestamp=1125.0)

## Topics

### Webflow University's Content Scaling Challenge

  - [**Problem:** The team cannot keep pace with Webflow's rapid feature releases.](https://fathom.video/share/CsFKcaS3_vV13w71Em4eL-AWPz7E2nos?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
      - [Engineering often finishes features the day before launch, leaving no time for content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/CsFKcaS3_vV13w71Em4eL-AWPz7E2nos?tab=summary&timestamp=444.0)
  - [**Bottlenecks:**](https://fathom.video/share/CsFKcaS3_vV13w71Em4eL-AWPz7E2nos?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
      - [**Scripting:** The most significant hurdle. A custom GPT helps, but requires heavy editing to remove poor AI-generated humor.](https://fathom.video/share/CsFKcaS3_vV13w71Em4eL-AWPz7E2nos?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
      - [**Post-Production:** High cost and effort for motion graphics to explain abstract concepts not visible in the UI.](https://fathom.video/share/CsFKcaS3_vV13w71Em4eL-AWPz7E2nos?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)
  - [**Brand Constraint:** The "human" brand requires polished, studio-quality video, ruling out fully automated AI video tools.](https://fathom.video/share/CsFKcaS3_vV13w71Em4eL-AWPz7E2nos?tab=summary&timestamp=457.0)

### GrowthX's Solution: The "Content Machine"

  - [**Approach:** A system using AI and human experts to scale content creation, treating it as an engineering problem, not just a writing task.](https://fathom.video/share/CsFKcaS3_vV13w71Em4eL-AWPz7E2nos?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
  - [**Webflow Case Study:**](https://fathom.video/share/CsFKcaS3_vV13w71Em4eL-AWPz7E2nos?tab=summary&timestamp=174.0)
      - [**Goal:** Scale integration documentation.](https://fathom.video/share/CsFKcaS3_vV13w71Em4eL-AWPz7E2nos?tab=summary&timestamp=174.0)
      - [**System:** Breaks down API docs and user needs into structured guides.](https://fathom.video/share/CsFKcaS3_vV13w71Em4eL-AWPz7E2nos?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
      - [**Result:** Increased output from \~3 docs/week to 30–40/week.](https://fathom.video/share/CsFKcaS3_vV13w71Em4eL-AWPz7E2nos?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
      - [**Impact:** 30k–50k weekly readers; content cited in sales calls.](https://fathom.video/share/CsFKcaS3_vV13w71Em4eL-AWPz7E2nos?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)
      - [**Expansion:** Now creating deeper guides (e.g., "how to build a subscription site").](https://fathom.video/share/CsFKcaS3_vV13w71Em4eL-AWPz7E2nos?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)

### Proposed Collaboration: AEO Course

  - [**Opportunity:** Webflow is developing a new AEO course, a perfect fit for GrowthX's expertise.](https://fathom.video/share/CsFKcaS3_vV13w71Em4eL-AWPz7E2nos?tab=summary&timestamp=809.0)
  - [**Format:** An interview with Jason, similar to the one with Ethan Smith, to provide practical scaling strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/CsFKcaS3_vV13w71Em4eL-AWPz7E2nos?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
  - [**Rationale:** GrowthX can teach the *how* of scaling content, building on the high-level AEO concepts covered by Ethan Smith.](https://fathom.video/share/CsFKcaS3_vV13w71Em4eL-AWPz7E2nos?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [**Interviewer Options:** Adrian (CRO) or Guy (Webflow contact who has collaborated with Jason before).](https://fathom.video/share/CsFKcaS3_vV13w71Em4eL-AWPz7E2nos?tab=summary&timestamp=993.0)
  - [**Context:** Webflow is an investor in GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/CsFKcaS3_vV13w71Em4eL-AWPz7E2nos?tab=summary&timestamp=1247.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Curtis:** Propose the interview with Jason to the Webflow University team.](https://fathom.video/share/CsFKcaS3_vV13w71Em4eL-AWPz7E2nos?tab=summary&timestamp=967.0)
  - [**Curtis:** Provide Jason with the scope and goals for the AEO course.](https://fathom.video/share/CsFKcaS3_vV13w71Em4eL-AWPz7E2nos?tab=summary&timestamp=1183.0)
  - [**Jason:** Send sample video clips to Curtis to demonstrate GrowthX's style and expertise.](https://fathom.video/share/CsFKcaS3_vV13w71Em4eL-AWPz7E2nos?tab=summary&timestamp=869.0)
